Some of the cloud native security tools that Stan specializes in include Trivy, Kube-Bench, Kube-Hunter, Tracee, Starboard, and Chainbench.Stan is also an active participant and speaker at prominent CNCF and cybersecurity events, including ISC2 Secure Singapore, KubeDay Singapore 2023, StandCon 2023, and K8SUG Meetups, where he covered an array of cloud native security topics such as: • Combatting the Unknowns with Aqua Tracee & eBPF • Cloud Native: The Security Awakens • Zero-day RCE Vulnerability Spring4Shell: What does it mean in Cloud Native? • Understand the 3 Essential Pillars of Cloud Native Security  He holds a plethora of professional certifications across cybersecurity, cloud, and cloud native domains, including the 5 cloud native certifications, CISSP, CCSP, CSSLP, CCSK, CCZT, CEH, and more. His published paper, which received the Best Paper Award at IEEE SOLI 2021, can be accessed at: "ASIST: Automated Strategic Partners Ranking and Recommendation System Using NLP and Security Intelligence," 2021 IEEE International Conference on Service Operations and Logistics, and Informatics (SOLI), 2021 (https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9672369).
